svg.title: Decoder-only transformer architecture — TPM reference
svg.desc: A structural diagram of a decoder-only transformer showing input tokens, embedding, N stacked decoder layers (each with masked self-attention and FFN/MLP), layer norm, and output projection, with TPM-relevant annotations for each component.
svg.text: GPT / Gemini / Claude architecture · annotations show TPM decision levers

g.text: Each token attends to prior tokens
